content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be repurposed to dynamically weight curiosity rewards from ICM (Intrinsic Curiosity Module) and RND (Random Network Distillation) based on how well a given unknown state aligns with the agent’s long-term task memory, rather than treating all novelty as equally valuable. This creates a hybrid curious agent that prioritizes exploratory steps that are most likely to fill gaps in task-relevant memory, rather than wasting exploration on permanently unlearnable or off-task novelty.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
